title: ghost in Australian Ghost Stories
publication_or_organisation: Australian Ghost Stories; ABC Overnights / Richard Davis
australian_relation: ABC Overnights public discussion of Australian ghost traditions and haunted houses with Richard Davis, author of Great Australian Ghost Stories.
evidence_summary: ABC Overnights asked whether listeners had seen a ghost, whether Australia is teeming with them, what ghosts have been seen throughout Australian history, who Australia's most famous ghost is, and where Australia's haunted houses are, in a discussion with Richard Davis, author of Great Australian Ghost Stories.
